# Enemy Archetype Template

- Id: stable string key
- Role: Chaser | Ranged | Tank | Summoner | Elite
- BaseStats: health, speed, damage, armor, resistances
- MovementModel: follow, strafe, kite, patrol
- AttackProfile: channel, burst, projectile, melee
- Cooldowns: per action
- TelegraphSettings: windup/indicator
- LootTableRef: ID
- DeathVfxKey: optional
- SpawnWeight: integer
